title: Luna 6 Frontal Collisions细项：Car-to-Car与Car-to-Motorcyclist场景得分
content: Car & PTW场景细项包括：Car-to-Car Rear 6.1938/6.5（各配置相同）；Car-to-Car Front 1V/1V2R为4.3334/5，1V3-5R/5V5R12Uss为4.5834/5；Car-to-Car Turn Across Path均为4.5625/5；Car-to-Car Crossing由4.2563/7.5提升至5.9363/7.5。摩托车场景中Rear约3.2993/3.5，Turn Across Path均4.5625/5，Crossing由4.2563升至5.9363。
